name: genie-skills
description: Claude Skills workspace: a genie router plus 13 specialist skills for research, design, coding discipline, memory, and content work.

plugins.name: genie
plugins.description: Router / single entry point. Matches a request to a specialist skill and tells the host/user what to invoke.

plugins.name: biz-council
plugins.description: Researches real user signal, scores candidate ideas, runs a 5-advisor council, produces an evidence-cited business/product design document.

plugins.name: design-report
plugins.description: Gives a visual artifact a deliberate design direction, persisted as a portable DESIGN.md token file; also formats findings into DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/PDF.

plugins.name: agent-builder
plugins.description: Designs a production-disciplined AI worker: goal, context, tools/permissions, memory, verification.

plugins.name: distribution
plugins.description: Finds where target-audience attention already exists and produces concrete trust-first channel angles.

plugins.name: curator
plugins.description: Watches a niche for what's timely, forms a specific honest-opinion angle, and scripts it for social.

plugins.name: vibe-coder
plugins.description: Workflow discipline for pair-programming with AI coding agents: task-to-tool routing, plan gate, verification before done.

plugins.name: video-producer
plugins.description: Turns a script/asset list into an actual rendered video: intros, transitions, lower thirds, animated infographics.

plugins.name: personal-memory
plugins.description: Stages a human's cross-session memory setup from built-in Memory through a self-consolidating Obsidian/LLM wiki.

plugins.name: game-dev
plugins.description: Builds/extends a 2D or 3D game with an AI agent driving the actual engine, gated by a one-page design doc.

plugins.name: biz-ops
plugins.description: Runs the back-office of an already-existing business: financial analysis, commercial deal work, business operations.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writes/edits prose to read as a specific human wrote it, via a catalogued AI-writing-pattern check.

plugins.name: social-carousel
plugins.description: Chains real trend research into a specific honest angle, exported as an Instagram/LinkedIn multi-slide carousel.
